description: This file contains utility functions for filtering and searching within data sets, specifically for applying text filters and sorting options to tabular data.

methods.name: textIncludes(haystack, needle)
methods.description: Checks if the haystack contains the needle, case-insensitive; returns true if needle is empty or null.

methods.name: applyFilters({ rows, filters, searchableKeys = [], sortNumericFallbackKey = "" })
methods.description: Applies multiple filters (text, entity, and sorting) to an array of data rows.

ctags.name: applyFilters
ctags.pattern: /^export function applyFilters({ rows, filters, searchableKeys = [], sortNumericFallbackKey = "" }/
